data.description:
## Description

Write a failing RED integration test for the `ticket validate` subcommand before the implementation exists. This test enforces TDD discipline and defines the exact contract the implementation must satisfy.

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-ticket-validate.sh (new)
- .test-index (modify — append test file to both `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket` and `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh` entries)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-ticket-validate.sh exists and is executable (chmod +x)
- [ ] Test uses the established `TICKET_CMD=<mock>` env injection pattern from tests/scripts/test-validate-issues.sh — NOT a full live ticket repo fixture
- [ ] Test invokes `ticket validate` through the dispatcher (not validate-issues.sh directly): `TICKET_CMD="$mock" "$DISPATCHER" validate [flags]`
- [ ] Test asserts all 5 exit tier values through the dispatcher chain: exit 0 (score=5, zero issues), exit 1 (score=4), exit 2 (score=3), exit 3 (score=2), exit 4 (score=1 critical)
- [ ] Test asserts --json flag produces JSON-parseable output (jq or grep for '{')
- [ ] Test asserts --terse flag produces abbreviated single-line output
- [ ] Tests FAIL with clear error (subcommand not found or wrong exit code) before implementation task T2 runs
- [ ] Test does NOT call validate-issues.sh directly (would create false positives)
- [ ] .test-index is updated to add tests/scripts/test-ticket-validate.sh to both `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket` and `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh` entries

## Red Marker
tests/scripts/test-ticket-validate.sh [test_validate_exit_codes_through_dispatcher]

## Notes
Exit tier arithmetic from validate-issues.sh calculate_score(): exit_code = 5 - score. Score 5 = zero issues of any kind. Score 4 = minor issues only. Score 3 = warnings or moderate issues. Score 2 = significant issues. Score 1 = 4+ critical issues. The mock TICKET_CMD must return ticket data that drives these counts. See tests/scripts/test-validate-issues.sh for the make_ticket_cmd() helper pattern — reuse or adapt it.
data.title: [RED] Write failing integration test for ticket validate dispatcher
